title: Studio Calico Sock Hop Sneak Peeks
excerpt: The truth is that I really did not have too much time to play with the Studio Calico November kit & Add-Ons #2, 3, and 4. But the day and half that I was actually home, I spent all my…
body:
The truth is that I really did not have too much time to play with the Studio Calico November kit & Add-Ons #2, 3, and 4. But the day and half that I was actually home, I spent all my time creating because I just could not stop. These kits rocked my paper loving world. I even pulled out my Silhouette and put that baby to work.

Full reveal of November Studio Calico kit and Add-Ons available October 27th.
